commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: - [P1] The implementation has no discrete code defect to automate; contributor-supplied real proof of the non-empty continuation path or an explicit maintainer proof exception is needed before merge.; Cleared: The focused Discord runtime and test diff does not change dependencies, package resolution, secrets, permissions, workflows, downloads, publishing, or other security-sensitive execution surfaces. (sha=1a2d7b4fec5f089d730acfd257602f82d4fc0648)
commands.review_summary:
The PR preserves the raw Discord thread-list response and adds normalized completion, count, query, source, and archived-page cursor metadata with regression tests.

PR surface: Source +78, Tests +89. Total +167 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at the source level: current main nests Discord's `has_more` only inside the raw `threads` value and exposes no normalized completion or cursor fields. The supplied live run also establishes the existing archived-thread action path, although it did not produce a paged result.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The implementation has no discrete code defect to automate; contributor-supplied real proof of the non-empty continuation path or an explicit maintainer proof exception is needed before merge.

target.title: Expose paged channel action results
target.body:
## Summary

- Preserve the existing Discord `thread-list` raw `threads` result while adding normalized pagination metadata at the action boundary.
- Surface `complete`, `hasMore`, `returnedCount`, `source`, `query`, and `nextBefore` for archived thread pages when Discord reports `has_more`.
- Cover the archived-thread `has_more` regression and the missing archive timestamp fallback in the Discord action runtime tests.

## Verification

- `PATH=/Users/jason/.nvm/versions/node/v24.14.0/bin:$PATH node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/discord/src/actions/runtime.test.ts`
- `PATH=/Users/jason/.nvm/versions/node/v24.14.0/bin:$PATH node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/anthropic-transport-stream.test.ts src/agents/simple-completion-runtime.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base upstream/main --codex-bin /Users/jason/.codex/openclaw-pr-autopilot/bin/codex-persist-sessions --model codex=gpt-5.5 --thinking codex=high`
- Crabbox/Testbox E2E on the earlier PR head: provider `<test-provider>`, lease `<test-lease>`, Actions run `<actions-run-url>`; checked out `<pr-ref>` and ran `corepack pnpm test:docker:npm-onboard-discord-channel-agent`, result `npm tarball onboard/channel/agent Docker E2E passed (discord)`.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Discord thread-list actions no longer hide Discord pagination under the raw provider payload; agents now get explicit completion and cursor metadata while existing callers can still read the prior raw `threads` field.

Real environment tested: A locally configured Discord bot in a test guild `<guild-id>`, using read-only OpenClaw message actions with the local bundled Discord plugin override so the patched source plugin was exercised.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: `OPENCLAW_DISABLE_PERSISTED_PLUGIN_REGISTRY=1 OPENCLAW_BUNDLED_PLUGINS_DIR=extensions OPENCLAW_TEST_TRUST_BUNDLED_PLUGINS_DIR=1 pnpm openclaw message thread list --channel discord --guild-id <guild-id> --channel-id <channel-id> --include-archived --limit 2 --json`

Evidence after fix: Copied live output from the local Discord `<channel-name>` archived-thread command:

```json
{
  "ok": true,
  "items": [],
  "complete": true,
  "hasMore": false,
  "returnedCount": 0,
  "source": "discord.threadList.archived",
  "query": {
    "guildId": "<guild-id>",
    "channelId": "<channel-id>",
    "includeArchived": true,
    "limit": 2
  },
  "threads": {
    "threads": [],
    "members": [],
    "has_more": false
  },
  "members": []
}
```

Observed result after fix: The active guild thread-list and archived `<channel-name>` thread-list both completed successfully through the Discord plugin and produced the normalized contract shape. A read-only sweep of local text channels found no archived threads, so the live result proves the compatible empty-page path without creating or uploading any Discord content.

What was not tested: A live non-empty archived-thread page with `has_more: true`, because the local Discord server had no archived threads in the swept text channels and I did not create or post test data. The paged cursor path is covered by focused regression coverage in this PR.
target.author: fuller-stack-dev

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
